checkpoints.description: Plus / Microphone / Send composer buttons expose accessible names via aria-label (WCAG 4.1.2, issue #1596)

checkpoints.deprecatedReason: Reflow refactor reverted as out-of-scope; only WCAG 4.1.2 (button aria-labels) is in scope for #1596. Track WCAG 1.4.10 separately.

checkpoints.description: Exactly one #chat-input-textarea exists in the DOM when canvas is open at 640 px — no duplicate mobile composer (issue #1596)
checkpoints.deprecatedReason: Duplicate-composer removal reverted with the reflow refactor; out of scope for #1596.

checkpoints.description: Skip-link keyboard journey: Tab makes "Skip to chat input" link visible, Enter moves focus to #chat-input-textarea — WCAG 2.4.1 (issue #1596)
checkpoints.deprecatedReason: Skip-link added by the reflow refactor reverted as out-of-scope; track WCAG 2.4.1 separately.
